/opt/homebrew/bin/gcc-15 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/zxbc-ply-lexdump.dir/plyparser/ply_lexdump_harness.c.o" -o zxbc-ply-lexdump  libzxbc_parser_lib.a ../zxbasm/libzxbasm_lib.a ../zxbpp/libzxbpp_lib.a ../common/libzxbasic_common.a -lm
